title: Steering Profile
description: Immutable, versioned steering profile. Contains all configuration needed to reproduce a steering setup: model, layers, vector bundle, and preset calibration table. Each profile should be immutable and versioned.

profile_id.description: Unique immutable identifier for this profile version, e.g. steer-gemma3-default-v12

base_model.description: Base model family and size identifier, e.g. gemma-3-27b-it

base_model_revision.description: Model revision or checkpoint date string, e.g. 2026-03-15

layers.description: Default steering layers. Typically sparse global layers for Gemma architecture, e.g. [23, 29, 35, 41, 47].

fallback_layer.description: Single-layer fallback used when multi-layer injection is unavailable or during degraded mode. Typically about two-thirds depth, e.g. 41.

vector_bundle_id.description: Reference to the trained concept vector bundle, e.g. vec-bundle-2026-04-01-rc2

preset_table.description: Calibrated multiplier values for each named intensity preset. Maps preset names to numeric multiplier values.

judge_bundle.description: Reference to the judge model/rubric bundle used for quality evaluation, e.g. judge-v4

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this profile was created
